agents.name: A2ABench

agents.name: Visual Creative

agents.name: Embedded Firmware Engineer
agents.description: Specialist in bare-metal and RTOS firmware - ESP32/ESP-IDF, PlatformIO, Arduino, ARM Cortex-M, STM32 HAL/LL, Nordic nRF5/nRF Connect SDK, FreeRTOS, Zephyr

agents.name: Full-Stack Engineer
agents.description: Senior full-stack engineer — frontend (React/Vue/Angular), backend architecture, mobile apps, rapid prototyping, and platform-specific development (WeChat, Feishu).

agents.name: Platform Engineer
agents.description: Platform and infrastructure engineer — DevOps, SRE, database optimization, data engineering, incident response, and production reliability at scale.

agents.name: Security Engineer
agents.description: Application and infrastructure security expert — threat modeling, vulnerability assessment, secure code review, detection engineering, and blockchain security auditing.

agents.name: Software Architect
agents.description: Senior software architect — system design, code review, Git workflows, AI/ML engineering, technical writing, and architectural decision-making for scalable systems.

agents.name: Game Developer
agents.description: Full-spectrum game developer — game design, level design, narrative design, technical art, and audio engineering across all engines and genres.

agents.name: Headless Browser
agents.description:
Fast headless browser for QA testing and site dogfooding. Navigate any URL, interact with
elements, verify page state, diff before/after actions, take annotated screenshots, check
responsive layouts, test forms and uploads, handle dialogs, and assert element states.
~100ms per command. Use when you need to test a feature, verify a deployment, dogfood a
user flow, or file a bug with evidence.

agents.name: GStack Browser QA
agents.description:
Fast headless browser for QA testing and site dogfooding. Navigate any URL, interact with
elements, verify page state, diff before/after actions, take annotated screenshots, check
responsive layouts, test forms and uploads, handle dialogs, and assert element states.
~100ms per command. Use when you need to test a feature, verify a deployment, dogfood a
user flow, or file a bug with evidence.

agents.name: GStack Upgrade
agents.description:
Upgrade gstack to the latest version. Detects global vs vendored install,
runs the upgrade, and shows what's new.

agents.name: CEO Plan Reviewer
agents.description:
CEO/founder-mode plan review. Rethink the problem, find the 10-star product,
challenge premises, expand scope when it creates a better product. Three modes:
SCOPE EXPANSION (dream big), HOLD SCOPE (maximum rigor), SCOPE REDUCTION
(strip to essentials).

agents.name: Engineering Plan Reviewer
agents.description:
Eng manager-mode plan review. Lock in the execution plan — architecture,
data flow, diagrams, edge cases, test coverage, performance. Walks through
issues interactively with opinionated recommendations.

agents.name: QA Test & Fix Engineer
agents.description:
Systematically QA test a web application and fix bugs found. Runs QA testing,
then iteratively fixes bugs in source code, committing each fix atomically and
re-verifying. Use when asked to "qa", "QA", "test this site", "find bugs",
"test and fix", or "fix what's broken". Three tiers: Quick (critical/high only),
Standard (+ medium), Exhaustive (+ cosmetic). Produces before/after health scores,
fix evidence, and a ship-readiness summary. For report-only mode, use /qa-only.

agents.name: QA Reporter
agents.description:
Report-only QA testing. Systematically tests a web application and produces a
structured report with health score, screenshots, and repro steps — but never
fixes anything. Use when asked to "just report bugs", "qa report only", or
"test but don't fix". For the full test-fix-verify loop, use /qa instead.

agents.name: Engineering Retrospective
agents.description:
Weekly engineering retrospective. Analyzes commit history, work patterns,
and code quality metrics with persistent history and trend tracking.
Team-aware: breaks down per-person contributions with praise and growth areas.

agents.name: Pre-Landing Code Reviewer
agents.description:
Pre-landing PR review. Analyzes diff against main for SQL safety, LLM trust
boundary violations, conditional side effects, and other structural issues.

agents.name: Browser Cookie Setup
agents.description:
Import cookies from your real browser (Comet, Chrome, Arc, Brave, Edge) into the
headless browse session. Opens an interactive picker UI where you select which
cookie domains to import. Use before QA testing authenticated pages.

agents.name: Release Engineer
agents.description: Ship workflow: merge main, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, commit, push, create PR.

agents.name: China Digital Marketer
agents.description: China digital marketing expert — Douyin, Kuaishou, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, WeChat, Weibo, Zhihu, livestream commerce, private domain operations, and China e-commerce across Taobao, Pinduoduo, and JD.

agents.name: Conversion Copywriter

agents.name: CRO Optimizer
agents.description: Full-funnel conversion rate optimization expert — audits pages, signup flows, onboarding, forms, popups, paywalls, and designs A/B tests to validate improvements.

agents.name: Product Leader

agents.name: Agentic Identity & Trust Architect

agents.name: Agents Orchestrator
agents.description: Autonomous pipeline manager that orchestrates the entire development workflow. You are the leader of this process.

agents.name: Automation Governance Architect

agents.description: Expert technical compliance auditor specializing in SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS audits — from readiness assessment through evidence collection to certification.

agents.name: Corporate Training Designer
agents.description: Expert in enterprise training system design and curriculum development — proficient in training needs analysis, instructional design methodology, blended learning program design, internal trainer development, leadership programs, and training effectiveness evaluation and continuous optimization.

agents.name: Cultural Intelligence Strategist
agents.description: CQ specialist that detects invisible exclusion, researches global context, and ensures software resonates authentically across intersectional identities.

agents.name: Developer Advocate

Bridges product and engineering teams with external developers.

agents.name: Government Digital Presales Consultant

agents.name: Healthcare Marketing Compliance Specialist

agents.name: Identity Graph Operator

agents.name: Supply Chain Strategist

Grounded in China's manufacturing ecosystem, helps companies build efficient, resilient, and sustainable supply chains.

agents.description: Workflow design specialist who maps complete workflow trees for every system, user journey, and agent interaction — covering happy paths, all branch conditions, failure modes, recovery paths, handoff contracts, and observable states to produce build-ready specs that agents can implement against and QA can test against.

agents.name: Operations Analyst
